/usr/bin/cc -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/unity/src=/usr/src/debug/unity -flto=auto -I/usr/include -I/usr/include/libindicator3-0.4 -I/usr/include/libido3-0.1 -I/usr/include/gtk-3.0 -I/usr/include/pango-1.0 -I/usr/include/cloudproviders -I/usr/include/cairo -I/usr/include/gdk-pixbuf-2.0 -I/usr/include/glycin-2 -I/usr/include/at-spi2-atk/2.0 -I/usr/include/at-spi-2.0 -I/usr/include/atk-1.0 -I/usr/include/dbus-1.0 -I/usr/lib/dbus-1.0/include -I/usr/include/fribidi -I/usr/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/include/harfbuzz -I/usr/include/freetype2 -I/usr/include/libpng16 -I/usr/include/gio-unix-2.0 -I/usr/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/include/libmount -I/usr/include/blkid -I/usr/include/sysprof-6 -pthread -pthread -Wall -Wno-error=deprecated-declarations -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/panel-a11y.c.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/panel-indicator-accessible.c.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/panel-indicator-entry-accessible.c.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/panel-main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/panel-root-accessible.c.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/panel-service.c.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-panel-service.dir/panel-util-accessible.c.o" -o unity-panel-service  -lgthread-2.0 -lindicator3 -lido3-0.1 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-bridge-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lX11 -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz
